description: Register a new delivery vehicle and set up its initial lifecycle records in the Fleet module using the credentials admin@example.com / admin (database: odoo_demo). Create a vehicle record for a Ford Transit with license plate TRK-885-XJ and VIN 1FT-YRN-2025-XK99. Establish a leasing contract for this vehicle with Gemini Fleet Services (Type: Leasing, Activation Date: Today, Recurring Cost: $650.00/Month, Status: In Progress). Additionally, log an initial odometer reading of 45 miles and a service event for a 'Pre-delivery safety inspection' (Type: Repair or Inspection) performed by Gemini Fleet Services with a total cost of $125.00.
